coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 50% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/1. 30-50% FTP, 85-100 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 50% for 45:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 45:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. Power: 30-50%, Cadence: 85-100 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.
